intro: Near the summit, on a ledge swept by cold wind, an old figure sits in perfect stillness, eyes closed, breathing slow.
speaker: Mountain Sage
introDialogue: You climbed all this way. Good. Strength is not only in battle, traveler. Tell me - will you train your body, or your technique?
title: The Mountain Sage
description: A disciplined recluse offers to train those who reach the summit. Choose your lesson: train the BODY for a growing-strength boon (vitamins and a Rare Candy), or train the TECHNIQUE for a Learner's Shroom to rebuild a Pokemon's moveset. Or bow and move on.
query: What will the Sage teach you?

1.label: Train the body
1.tooltip: (+) Vitamins to grow stats + a Rare Candy
1.selected: The Sage drills you through grueling forms until your team is stronger for it.

2.label: Train the technique
2.tooltip: (+) A Learner's Shroom - teach a Pokemon any move it can learn
2.selected: The Sage shares an old secret, and presses a Learner's Shroom into your hand.

3.label: Bow and move on
3.selected: You bow to the Sage and continue your climb.
